subcodes.first_line: Upon thee, O thou who hast turned toward God, be the Glory of thy Lord, the Most Glorious! Blessed art thou, for having quaffed the pure waters of reunion from His hands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک یا ایها المتوجه الی الله بهاء ربک الابهی طوبی لک بما شربت سلسبیل اللقاء من ایادی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for praise and gratitude
